introSection:
Jellikins Coaster is a steel indoor kiddie roller coaster built by UK manufacturer W.G.H. Transportation Engineering currently located at Fantasy Island in Ingoldmells, Lincolnshire, England, UK.

Riders must have a height between 100 and 160 cm (39.4 and 63.0 inches).

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was previously called Junior Rhombus Rocket and later Kiddy Fun Coaster until 1999, when the name was changed to Jellikins Coaster, themed after the computer-animated pre-school television series of the same name.

fullText:
Jellikins Coaster is a steel indoor kiddie roller coaster built by UK manufacturer W.G.H. Transportation Engineering currently located at Fantasy Island in Ingoldmells, Lincolnshire, England, UK.

Riders must have a height between 100 and 160 cm (39.4 and 63.0 inches).

The ride was previously called Junior Rhombus Rocket and later Kiddy Fun Coaster until 1999, when the name was changed to Jellikins Coaster, themed after the computer-animated pre-school television series of the same name.



Multicolored track and supports.

The train has enclosed vehicles.
